rulings.Case Title: JUAN CARLOS GALICIA ET AL VS. MARCO MONROY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion For An Order That Matters Set Forth In Plaintiffs Request For Admissions (Set One) Be Deemed Admitted, And For A Monetary Sanctionaintiffs Special Interrogatories (Set One), And For A Monetary Sanction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for OCtober 20, 2020 Line 4 PLAINTIFFS JUAN GALICIA, PATRICIA GALICIA'S Motion For An Order That Matters Set Forth In Plaintiffs Request For Admissions (Set One) Be Deemed Admitted, And For A Monetary Sanctionaintiffs Special Interrogatories (Set One), And For A Monetary Sanction is OFF CALENDAR. Motions calendared directly for department 501 in violation of the Local Rule 8.10(A)(4). On September 9, 2020 the Court transferred a prior improperly calendared motion to Department 302. On September 22, 2020 Plaintiff again improperly calendared the motions for 501. (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: J.G. DUTRA & SON, A CALIFORNIA GENERAL PARTNERSHIP VS. FRESNO AUTO SPA, INC., ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for OCtober 20, 2020 Line 11 DEFENDANTS IGOR PASKHOVER, VLADIMIR SYELSKY'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is moot. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: J.G. DUTRA & SON, A CALIFORNIA GENERAL PARTNERSHIP VS. FRESNO AUTO SPA, INC., ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for OCtober 20, 2020 Line 11 DEFENDANTS IGOR PASKHOVER, VLADIMIR SYELSKY'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts to support alter ego liability, to allege in good faith and support by facts date of unauthorized sublet prior to the expiration of the guarantee, and facts in support of each element of fraud cause of action. If Plaintiff is alleging both misrepresentation and concealment, these causes of action shall be separately alleged and supported by facts. =(501/CFH)
